title: Laminate Flooring
shortDescription: Premium wooden laminate flooring. Get the luxury look of real hardwood at an affordable price. Highly durable and scratch-resistant for homes and offices in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Transform your home or office with Goals Floors' Premium Laminate Flooring. If you want the luxurious, warm feel of real hardwood without the heavy cost and difficult maintenance, this is the perfect choice for you.

Our laminate flooring is specially engineered for the extreme weather of Delhi NCR. It features a super-strong High-Density Fiber (HDF) core and a tough AC-4 top layer. Whether you are renovating a beautiful apartment on Golf Course Road or designing a busy corporate office in Cyber City, this floor easily handles heavy foot traffic, moving furniture, and daily wear and tear.

It is highly scratch-resistant, does not catch fire easily (cigarette burn resistant), and is incredibly easy to clean. With our modern 'Click-Lock' system, it can be installed directly over your old floor in just 1 to 2 days without any messy glue, cement, or demolition.

features.title: Highly Durable (AC-4 Grade)
features.description: Tough enough for heavy traffic in offices, retail shops, and busy homes. It easily resists scratches from shoes, toys, and furniture.

features.title: Strong HDF Wood Core
features.description: Made with premium High-Density Fiberboard (HDF) that stays stable and doesn't bend or break easily like cheaper MDF boards.

features.title: Scratch & Stain Resistant
features.description: The protective top layer protects the floor from daily liquid spills, food stains, and even accidental cigarette burns.

features.title: Fast, Glue-Free Installation
features.description: Uses a smart 'Click-Lock' system. The wooden planks easily join together like a puzzle without any messy cement or adhesive.

features.title: Safe for Family & Kids
features.description: Made from eco-friendly materials that don't release bad odors or harmful chemicals, ensuring very safe indoor air quality.

features.title: Extremely Easy to Clean
features.description: Dust and allergens don't stick to its surface. Just sweep normally or use a slightly damp mop to keep it shining like new.

installation: The installation is extremely fast and completely dry. You do not need to break your old floor. As long as your subfloor (old tiles or concrete) is flat and dry, we lay down a soft foam sheet and simply click the wooden planks together. Matching wooden skirting is added to the walls for a neat and premium finish.
maintenance: It is virtually maintenance-free. For daily cleaning, just use a normal broom or a vacuum cleaner. For deep cleaning, use a slightly damp (well-wrung) microfiber mop (pocha). Please avoid throwing buckets of water, using steam cleaners, or harsh scrubbers.

faqs.question: What exactly is Laminate Flooring?
faqs.answer: Laminate flooring is an advanced artificial wood floor. It has a strong HDF wood core, a high-definition printed layer that looks exactly like real wood, and a tough, clear protective layer on top.

faqs.question: Can I install it over my old tiles or marble?
faqs.answer: Yes! This is its biggest advantage. As long as your existing tile or marble floor is completely flat and dry, we can install the laminate flooring directly over it, saving you the cost of breaking the old floor.

faqs.question: Is this laminate flooring waterproof?
faqs.answer: Standard laminate flooring is 'water-resistant', not 100% waterproof. It can easily handle accidental water spills if you wipe them up quickly, but it should never be used in bathrooms, kitchens, or open balconies.

faqs.question: Will this flooring attract termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: No. Our premium HDF core is chemically treated during the manufacturing process to be highly resistant to termites and borers, keeping your home safe.

faqs.question: Does it get scratched easily by furniture or kids?
faqs.answer: No, our flooring comes with an AC-4 commercial-grade rating. This means the top layer is very tough and highly resistant to daily scratches from moving furniture, kids' toys, and normal foot traffic.

faqs.question: How do I clean it on a daily basis?
faqs.answer: Cleaning is very simple. Just sweep or vacuum the dust. You can also use a slightly damp (not wet) mop. Never pour water directly on the floor.

faqs.question: What is the difference between HDF and MDF core?
faqs.answer: HDF (High-Density Fiberboard) is much denser, stronger, and handles moisture much better than the cheaper MDF (Medium-Density Fiberboard). We only use premium HDF for a longer life.

faqs.question: How much time does the installation take?
faqs.answer: Because of our fast 'Click-Lock' system, there is no cement or drying time needed. A standard 2 or 3-bedroom apartment can easily be completed in just 1 to 2 days.

faqs.question: Do I need to buy skirting separately?
faqs.answer: Yes. Wooden flooring requires a small gap near the walls to expand in summer. Matching wooden skirting boards are used to cover this gap and give your room a premium, finished look.

faqs.question: What is the price of this flooring in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Our Classic Laminate Series starts at approx ₹90/sq.ft. We also offer highly competitive wholesale/B2B project pricing for builders, architects, and interior designers in Gurugram, Noida, and Delhi.

installationSteps.title: Prepare the Subfloor
installationSteps.description: Make sure the existing floor is ready:
points: Ensure the floor is completely flat and level.
Clean it thoroughly to remove any dust, pebbles, or dirt.
It must be completely dry. Do not install on damp floors.
installationSteps.tip: A perfectly flat floor stops the wooden planks from bouncing or making noise when you walk on them.

installationSteps.title: Lay the Foam Underlay
points: Roll out the soft acoustic foam sheet completely over the floor.
Tape the edges of the foam together so it doesn't move.
Do not put one foam layer on top of another (no overlapping).

installationSteps.title: Click & Lock the Planks
points: Take a wooden plank, angle it slightly at 30 degrees.
Insert the edge (tongue) into the groove of the plank on the floor.
Press it down flat to lock it seamlessly. You will feel a tight fit.
installationSteps.tip: Stagger the joints (like a brick wall pattern) to make the whole floor much stronger.

installationSteps.title: Maintain Expansion Gaps
points: Always leave an 8mm to 10mm gap around all the walls.
Use small spacer blocks to hold this gap while installing.
installationSteps.tip: Wood naturally expands slightly in different seasons. This small gap prevents the floor from buckling upwards.
